title: Add back arrow navigation from profile to hub

requirements.text: Add a back arrow button in the ProfileView component that navigates to the hub page when clicked

quotes: give a back arrow option on the profile page that takes you back to the hub page

acceptanceCriteria: A back arrow button is visible on the profile page
Clicking the back arrow navigates the user to the hub page
The back arrow is positioned appropriately in the ProfileView layout

nonGoals: Changing the existing profile page functionality beyond adding navigation
Modifying the hub page layout or components
